2606.31461.title: CSTrader: A Testbed for Language-Grounded Trading in a Community-Driven Virtual Asset Market
2606.31461.paper_summary: Niche asset markets, such as Counter-Strike 2 (CS2) weapon skins, are small, volatile, and heavily driven by community discussions and platform rules. These properties make them hard for traditional quantitative models, but provide an ideal testbed for studying how large language models (LLMs) turn unstructured text into trading actions. We present CSTrader, a multi-agent framework for language-grounded trading in the CS2 skin market. The system first integrates heterogeneous signals from various sources, then uses specialized agents for technical analysis, liquidity, events, and (reversed) sentiment, and finally applies risk control, transaction friction, and portfolio management agents to produce buy, sell, or hold decisions under realistic trading frictions. We build a live-like evaluation environment with real CS2 data from a highly volatile period and evaluate several recent LLM backbones. Across models, CSTrader consistently outperforms both a falling market index (-15.62%) and simple single-prompt LLM baselines, achieving up to a 7.58% cumulative return with controlled risk. Ablation studies show that liquidity, reversed sentiment, and transaction friction agents are crucial for turning noisy language signals into stable profits, suggesting that niche, language-driven markets are a useful benchmark for future language-to-action research. Code is available at: https://github.com/IatomicreactorI/CSGOTrading?tab=readme-ov-file#quick-start
2606.31461.paper_summary_zh: 小型資產市場，例如《反恐精英2》（CS2）武器皮膚，具有小規模、高波動性，並且受到社群討論和平台規則的強烈驅動。這些特性使得傳統的量化模型難以應用，但為研究大型語言模型（LLMs）如何將非結構化文本轉化為交易行為提供了理想的試驗平台。我們提出了CSTrader，一個針對CS2皮膚市場的語言驅動交易的多代理框架。該系統首先整合來自各種來源的異質信號，然後使用專門的代理進行技術分析、流動性、事件和（反向）情緒分析，最後應用風險控制、交易摩擦和投資組合管理代理，在現實的交易摩擦下產生買入、賣出或持有的決策。我們建立了一個類似實時的評估環境，使用來自高波動期的真實CS2數據，並評估了幾個最近的LLM骨幹模型。在各模型中，CSTrader始終優於下跌的市場指數（-15.62%）和簡單的單提示LLM基準，實現了高達7.58%的累積回報，並控制了風險。消融研究顯示，流動性、反向情緒和交易摩擦代理對於將嘈雜的語言信號轉化為穩定的利潤至關重要，這表明小型、語言驅動的市場是未來語言到行動研究的有用基準。代碼可在以下鏈接獲得：https://github.com/IatomicreactorI/CSGOTrading?tab=readme-ov-file#quick-start
2606.31461.author: Yao Shi et.al.
2606.31461.authors: Yao Shi, Kingfung Luo, Nan Tang, Yuyu Luo
